title: verbascum × pseudospeciosum
intro: Verbascum × pseudospeciosum, also known as False Mullein, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the mullein genus. It is a biennial or perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots are used to create herbal preparations that can help to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as to treat skin conditions and wounds. Additionally, the plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation, and it is often used in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
